title: structural-bounds-framework: A universal spectral lower bound on the leave-node-out generalisation error of graph-supervised learning
description: Companion software, working notes, and LaTeX manuscript source for 'A universal spectral lower bound on the leave-node-out generalisation error of graph-supervised learning' (R. Fossé and G. Pallares, in preparation for JMLR / FoCM). The repository provides: (i) the formal proofs of the three main theorems (universal lower bound, ERM upper bound with Rademacher slack, Berry-Esseen minimax tightness) in research notes notes/01-03, (ii) the consolidated working draft of the manuscript in paper.tex, (iii) the corollary derivations recovering the materials-applicability-bound (MLST) and mobility-applicability-bound (TR-B) results. Empirical anchors are provided by the sibling repositories of the cycling-data-lab organisation.
notes: Working-draft companion software release. Reproducibility: SEED=42 master seed, dependencies pinned in requirements.txt, Python 3.12. Earlier git tags are pre-release snapshots; v1.0 will mark the JMLR / FoCM submission snapshot.
